tweets.full_text:
10 Reasons why $ANSEM could still go to $1B:

1 | Skin in the game:
Unlike most KOL coins, creator fees (already over $1.4M generated) and airdrops flow back to holders and the trenches.

2 | 1M+ Followers:
With 1M+ followers, every Ansem post, reply about “Black Bull” triggers massive organic posts across CT. Attention is the most valuable currency.

3 | $WIF Blueprint:
Ansem (@blknoiz06) single-handedly helped turn $WIF into a multi-billion Solana success story. Why not doing it a second time?

4 | Explosive Holder Growth:
Already 129K+ holders which are an organic marketing army that scales virality.

5 | Path to Major Listings:
As MC grows toward $1B, natural CEX listings (Binance, Coinbase, etc.) follow

6 | Powerful “Black Bull” Narrative:
A perfect narrative at a boring time. One that literally grabs everyone’s attention.

7 | General Support:
Ansem gets support not only from his community, but also from Solana and other big KOLs, chains, and companies—basically everyone rooting for a success story.

8 | Strong onchain Data:
After just a few weeks, $ANSEM not only has deeper liquidity than most OG memecoins, but also leads in volume day after day.

9 | Bull Market as Catalyst:
We're still in a bear market. But what happens if BTC goes back to $70-80K??

10 | Risk-Reward Asymmetry:
From ~$100M MC to $1B is a realistic 8-10x in a strong run (many memes have done 50-100x). Low relative to top memes’ peaks, with proven resilience through corrections, makes it attractive for new capital.

tweets.full_text:
I don't think you guys understand how bullish it is that Solana leads spot volume

We've been talking about Perp volume all year long but Spot volume is so incredibly hard to attract AND retain

You can get better fills than on Binance, Coinbase and other CEXs for things like BTC ZEC and even HYPE.

It took years of massive effort to become the leader and it will take years for any competitor to rival Solana's retention.

For some reason, having distribution and a living ecosystem doesn't matter much nowadays.

You can stake SOL and your staking rewards automatically DCA into literally every token on @solana

I can imagine people running risk-on strategies like using the rewards to DCA into memecoins and narratives like Perp DEXs, Privacy coins etc

I have said in the past that projects looking to grow stake should find ways to get users, so this is interesting.

legacy.description: Making a living with Defi

profile_bio.description: Making a living with Defi

legacy.full_text:
I'm in crypto for almost a decade

Here are my 11 biggest lessons and mistakes:

1 | Avoid high leverage:
90% lose money trading perps, and only ~5% make consistent long-term profits. Even if you think you understand the market, you probably don't. Leverage is a tool, but https://t.co/jPpCC8fxd2

result.text:
I'm in crypto for almost a decade

Here are my 11 biggest lessons and mistakes:

1 | Avoid high leverage:
90% lose money trading perps, and only ~5% make consistent long-term profits. Even if you think you understand the market, you probably don't. Leverage is a tool, but anything above 10x is gambling. Most wealthy people in crypto made their money with spot, not leverage.

2 | Don't trust CT:
Much of what you see is fake or misleading. Don't FOMO after seeing huge PnLs. Countertrading Crypto Twitter often works. Be greedy when others are fearful is where I made the most money.

3 | Protect your capital:
Especially early on. A 50% loss requires a 2x to recover. An 80% loss requires a 5x. Avoid big drawdowns at all costs.

4 | Don't chase hype:
Don't jump into every meta. Simply holding BTC, SOL, and earning yield often beats active trading. Time (dips) and patience are your biggest edge.

5 | Learn skills:
Big gains take time. In the meantime, build skills, grow an audience, start a side hustle, and earn more money to invest. Opportunities are everywhere.

6 | Always take profits:
No matter how small. Move profits to a hardware wallet and earn yield or put in BTC instead of round-tripping everything.

7 | Control your emotions:
Money rewards rational thinking. Only invest what you can afford to lose, so emotions won't control your decisions.

8 | Don't baghold:
Hold only 3–5 high-conviction positions. Every other trade should have a clear timeframe. Better to sell at -20% than hope until you're down -70%.

9 | Farm smart:
Only farm airdrops that generate yield or rewards along the way. Don't pay upfront for uncertain outcomes, and don't farm every airdrop.

10 | Keep ~70% in stables:
Earn yield on your stables, use that yield to buy BTC and SOL, and always keep cash ready for dips—they always come.

11 | Surround yourself with smart people:
Especially those who challenge your thinking and force you to question your assumptions.

Overall:

Patience wins. Don't get addicted to making money fast. That's how people end up gambling it all away. Wait for high-conviction opportunities, stick to your plan, and never FOMO.

Make the process your goal

"Our mission is to unblock founders. Get them to use the protocol, build applications." 
👉The biggest advantage? Solana stays extremely malleable because it's powered by a huge community of independent builders — without any central blocker. 

"I'm not their CEO or decision-maker. They have their own ideas, VCs, and funding. They just go build without asking permission." 
👉 This decentralized approach is what keeps Solana moving fast. 
Do you agree? 👇

Jupiter hasn't stopped shipping all month, here are the latest updates from last week

- Earn on Recurring.
Funds in your DCA orders no longer sit idle. They earn yield in Jupiter Lend until each buy fills.

- USDC Rewards for Good Feedback
Drop some feedback on jupiter spot, what you'd want, what's missing, what you'd hate to lose. The top 10 most useful pieces of feedback get rewarded in USDC

- Jupiter VIP
If you’re in a VIP program elsewhere, Jupiter gives you a flat 3% cashback on your Jupiter card once you’re verified and approved.

- Jupiter Q2 ASR
You can claim your Active Staking Rewards from the jupiter rewards tab until October 8th

result.text:
$JUP supply is getting tighter

Jupiter just surpassed 1B JUP staked, it's over 30% of circulating supply locked

Staking has been in an uptrend for 9 straight months since October 2025 showing holders conviction

Buybacks could accumulate another estimated 12% of circulating supply by year end

That’s well over 40% of circulating supply effectively off the market, with zero unlocks

With more products and upgrades launching, both staking and buybacks could keep growing

Are you staking any JUP?
